name: Re-asking guest name after it was already given
expected_behavior: Sarah's name captured in turn 1 and used naturally in later turns without re-asking. By turn 3, 'Sarah' should appear in the response as a natural address. Agent never asks 'What's your name?' or 'And who am I speaking with?'
expected_behavioral_quality: Guest introduces themselves in turn 1. Agent must NOT ask for name in any subsequent turn. Name should appear naturally in later responses (sign-offs, confirmations) without being re-asked.

turns.user_message: Hi, I'm Sarah. What restaurants do you have?
turns.agent_response:
Welcome, Sarah. For a vibrant lunch or dinner today, I highly recommend SolToro Taqueria & Tequila Bar located in the Casino of the Earth. The atmosphere is electric and colorful, and their fresh ceviche paired with an authentic mezcal is a perfect way to settle into the resort. They are open until 10:00 PM today with mid-range pricing, and you generally do not need a reservation for their casual setting.

Since it is just after 1:00 PM, you could also catch the final hour of service at Hash House A Go Go if you are craving massive portions of farm-to-table comfort food before they close at 2:00 PM. If you find yourself looking for a meal in the middle of the night, the Lantern Bar & Grill is a reliable choice as it remains open 24 hours a day for American classics. Please keep in mind that hours and prices can vary, so it is always a good idea to confirm those details once you are on the property.

After you have had a chance to eat, the Wolf Den in the Casino of the Earth often has great live music that makes for a perfect post-dinner stop.

What kind of flavors are you usually drawn to when you dine out?

You'll find we have two distinct ways to unwind here, Sarah. Mandara Spa is our award-winning full-service sanctuary that draws on Balinese healing traditions. It is open until 8:00 PM today and includes a steam room, sauna, and a beautiful relaxation lounge that's perfect for a deep reset. 

If you are looking for something more modern or perhaps an express service, the Elemis Spa in the Earth Tower is open until 7:00 PM and specializes in premium skincare and couples experiences. Both are excellent, though I find the Mandara's hot stone massage is legendary if you really want to decompress. For hotel guests, we also have a heated indoor pool and hot tub open until 10:00 PM tonight if you just want a quick soak.

Keep in mind that treatment availability and pricing can change, so it's always best to confirm those details when you arrive at the spa. After a relaxing afternoon, you might enjoy heading over to the Wolf Den in the Casino of the Earth for some live music—the energy there is fantastic and the shows are free.

Do you prefer a full-body treatment or something more focused, like a facial?

turns.user_message: Can you recommend something fun tonight?
turns.agent_response:
Sarah, for tonight, the Wolf Den in the Casino of the Earth is your best bet for a high-energy evening. They host free nightly live music, typically starting at 8:00 PM or 9:00 PM, and the intimate setting makes you feel like you're right there with the band.

Since seating for these complimentary shows is first-come, first-served, I suggest arriving a little early to grab a spot. The atmosphere there is truly electric once the music starts, and it's a great way to experience the heart of the resort's entertainment without needing a ticket. If you're looking for a more laid-back vibe before the show, you could stop by the Mandara Spa earlier in the afternoon for a quick reset. 

Schedule and availability can change, so it's a good idea to confirm the performance time once you're on the floor.

Do you have a particular style of music you enjoy most?
